name: person_info
description: Run a snapshot-first known-person lookup, scan visible face tracks with local Face Identity, compare against the OpenVision contact identity DB, enrich matches from People Registry metadata, and answer flexibly with the person name or requested profile details. A bounded live name-reminder mode is available only when explicitly requested.
activation_phrases_vi: người này tôi đã gặp chưa
tôi có biết người này không
cho tôi thông tin về người này

query.description: Original user request. Keep follow-up wording such as 'còn thông tin gì không' so Jetson can choose the right detail level.

question.description: Optional alias for query when the realtime model phrases this as a question.

info_focus.description: Use name for 'có ai quen không'; summary for normal info; contact/relationship/full for specific follow-ups.

scan_mode.description: Default snapshot for low power. Use name_reminder/live_video only when the user explicitly asks for realtime name reminders.

media_mode.description: Optional lower-level media override; scan_mode is preferred.

snapshot_sample_count.description: Optional snapshot quality gate sample count. Default is 4 recent preview frames.

snapshot_min_new_frames.description: Optional minimum new preview frames before person_info snapshot continuation.

snapshot_settle_ms.description: Optional camera settle time for snapshot quality gate.

media_profile.description: Optional Jetson-authoritative live camera profile for name_reminder/live_video. Snapshot remains the default for normal person_info.

acceptance_tests: uses snapshot MediaCommand by default for low-power known-person lookup
quality-gates snapshot capture by sampling recent preview frames and selecting the clearest face frame
can start bounded live_video only when scan_mode requests live name reminder
runs local Face Identity over the captured snapshot or live stream instead of using cloud visual identity
matches visible face embeddings against the local OpenVision contact identity DB
reports face-quality reasons such as too dark, too small, low contrast, or blurry before treating a lookup as no match
enriches the matched name with People Registry metadata when available
shows multiple face thumbnails with known names when a crowd snapshot contains several people
returns only a short name answer for 'có ai quen không'
returns richer stored details for follow-up questions such as phone, address, first met, relationship, or notes
failure_modes: visible face is too small, too dark, low contrast, or blurred for identity matching
matched contact is not linked to a People Registry profile
